title: Miriam Beauchamp
content:
Manager, External Communications
People.ContactEmail mbeauchamp@mccarthy.ca
Miriam Beauchamp is a bilingual communications leader with over 15 years of experience in professional services and marketing. As Communications Manager at McCarthy Tétrault, she spearheads the development and execution of communications strategies that reflect the firm’s brand and business goals. Her role encompasses content creation, media relations, and bilingual editorial oversight.
Previously, Miriam held senior communications roles at other firms in the accounting and legal sectors, where she advised leadership on strategic messaging, employee engagement, and crisis communications. She is known for her creative storytelling, strategic thinking, and ability to lead with clarity and collaboration.
Miriam holds a BBA in Marketing from the Université de Sherbrooke and is a graduate of The A Effect leadership program. She was also a long-time volunteer with Big Brothers Big Sisters of Greater Montreal.
